provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1. Short title This Act may be cited as the White Phosphorus Matches Act [Chapter 14:25] .

provisions.title: Prohibitions
provisions.content: 2. Prohibitions The manufacture, importation or sale of matches containing white phosphorus is prohibited.

provisions.title: Penalties
provisions.content: 3. Penalties Any person who contravenes section two shall be guilty of an offence and liable to a fine not exceeding level five or to imprisonment for a period not exceeding six months or to both such fine and such imprisonment. [section as amended by Act No. 22 of 2001 ]
